description: Goal: close the mini-epic only after the new model is documented, observable, and old concepts are mechanically absent. Signal: cargo test --lib compiler2:: passes; fact-engine and semantic-fixpoint docs describe current/settled evidence accurately; telemetry exposes readiness transitions; grep checks prove obsolete concepts are gone, not renamed. Strategy: update .agent docs and guides, add or adjust telemetry at the World scheduler seam, run hard no-go searches for semantic_closure_is_current, DependencySnapshot, ReturnType-as-ready-Ty, ActivationKey.input body evidence, outputs Vec<(FactKey,bool)>, missing-return-as-none, unresolved-as-any, and stale FactValue::Inputs docs. Any survivor requires either deletion in this ticket or a new blocking ticket.
title: Compiler2 fact readiness closeout: docs telemetry and deletion contract
